## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach used to solve it.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run package`
- [ ] The generated plugin archive was tested on WordPress
- [ ] Editor behavior was tested when applicable
- [ ] Frontend behavior was tested when applicable

List the WordPress, PHP, and browser versions used.

## Compatibility and screenshots

Describe any saved-block, API, accessibility, or backward-compatibility effects. Add screenshots or recordings for interface changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated refactoring
- [ ] Documentation and changelog entries were updated when needed
- [ ] Generated `build/` files are included for source asset changes
- [ ] No credentials, personal data, private URLs, or debug artifacts are included
